betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Advanced Hazard Protection§f

§aHeavy radiation suits for reactor cores and contamination zones.§f

§bHigh-Performance Hazmat§f: Lead-reinforced cloth. RR 2.0 total. Noticeable improvement over basic.
§bLiquidator Suit§f: Lead cladding + Empty Gas Tanks + High-Performance parts. RR 2.39 total. Slows movement but best protection before PaA.

§cWarning§f: Liquidator reduces speed by 40%. Don't wear it for normal exploration.

§eTip§f: Check JEI — Liquidator upgrades FROM High-Performance pieces, so don't skip that step.
